area: Abandoned task re-import still requires emergency --force
finding: After a mistaken `tasks abandon` on a freshly imported ready/in-progress card (`TASK-AAO-0191`), `tasks import --write --reopen` / `--reset-open` still fail with `ATM_TASKS_IMPORT_DRIFT` asking for `--force`, and `--force` always routes through the emergency approval lease even though the ledger is abandoned/inert with no active claim.
expectedBehavior: Reopening an abandoned/inert task from its planning card when there is no active claim should be a normal operator path (`--reopen` or `--reset-open`) without emergency approval; emergency should remain only for overwriting active claims or protected live work.
evidenceOrRepro: Fixed in TASK-AAO-0192: `writeTaskFiles` now allows `--reopen`/`--reset-open` to overwrite hash-drifted inert ledgers without `--force`. Regression covers abandoned reopen in `import-orchestrator.spec.ts`.
followUp: Keep active-claim protection; do not soften emergency for live claims.
